markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new directors Darrell and Megan, providing context on GrowthX's vision, strategy, and product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to help brands become more like publishers, delivering high-value content systematically](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Company is transitioning to its own platform in 3-4 weeks, consolidating workflows from AirOps and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Long-term vision includes building task-specific AI models and a "ContentOS" to capture expert knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Current focus is on refining roles (Managing Directors, Managing Editors, Content Managers) and improving client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Philosophy

  - [Shift from empty marketing to valuable, publisher-like content](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Systematically become the best answer to audience questions](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Build trust by delivering free, high-quality resources](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Position content as a product, identifying unique market gaps](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Extract knowledge from experts, package it effectively for target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### Content Production Process Evolution

  - [Previous challenges: managing large volumes (e.g., 20 articles/week, 60+ assignments in pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Distilled thought processes into LLM workflows](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Implemented strategic brief creation, connecting audience intent to content](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Developed a "strategy sprint" approach (6-8 weeks) to set direction before ramping up production](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Three layers: Managing Directors, Managing Editors, Content Managers](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Managing Directors: Own client relationships, set strategy](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Managing Editors: Execute strategy, maintain quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Content Managers: Behind-the-scenes execution, moving towards a centralized production function](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Current focus on clarifying roles and responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Technology Platform Development

  - [Transitioning from AirOps and Airtable to proprietary platform in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [New platform features:](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Grid-like workflow experience](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [In-platform editing with TipTap](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
      - [Capture of editing process and "messy middle"](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [More prescriptive guidance and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [Chat functionality for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### Future Vision and AI Integration

  - [Building task-specific AI models from accumulated data and expert knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Creating a "ContentOS" to capture and reproduce expert workflows](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Potential to outperform frontier models in specific tasks at lower cost](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Long-term goal: AI-powered knowledge work assistance, similar to coding agents for developers](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue refining roles and responsibilities within the team structure](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Prepare for transition to new proprietary platform in 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Directors to focus on building strong client relationships and setting strategy](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Further onboarding sessions planned with all directors](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [In-person meetings to be scheduled when possible](https://fathom.video/share/MF6fzteFWyRpUMMnmSBxqmGxR2FyJV3f?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
